name_en: Top-tier ✨M13404 White Multicolore Chain Clutch New Season LV x TM POCHETTE ACCESSOIRES Handbag This Pochette Accessoires handbag is crafted from coated canvas, interpreting the dynamic style of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration series with a colorful Monogram pattern. Calfskin trim and dazzling metalware accentuate exquisite details, while the detachable shoulder strap and chain offer flexible carrying options. 13 x 4 x 22 cm.
